name: Milk's Shakes | Pizza Thot!
description:
"G-Goodness...! What did they order?? I though I was providing the milk..."

Meet Milk, the anxiety ridden main waitress here at PizzaThot! Getting her name from the massive mounds on her chest, Obviously. Don't squeeze them too hard, They might leak!

(Character and Art by acgats_)

I did not mean for this bot to take this long.

Lowkey I've been in a crazy depressive rut recently and have found it pretty hard to do anything.

So I've just been drowning in work.

But! I was finally able to push out the intro for this bot, so I hope you guys enjoy it.

OH and also, if you have suggestions for some more greetings, shoot them out. She doesn't have much to work with image wise.

P.B. is next, and hopefully will be out sooner. (Also let me know if you guys would rather all of the PizzaThot bots out one by one or if you'd rather some different characters inbetween them.)

Knowing my usual schedule, I probably won't be getting another bot out by Christmas, so I'll say it here.

Merry Christmas, and Happy Holidays!
creator: wisperrr
